panels.title: Data freshness (s desde último point)
panels.description: Segundos desde el último DataPoint emitido. >60s = pipeline degradado.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time"])
  |> group()
  |> max(column: "_time")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value: float(v: int(v: now()) - int(v: r._time)) / 1000000000.0 }))

panels.title: Ingest rate (points/sec, last 5m)
panels.description: Throughput total de puntos llegando a InfluxDB. Esperado ≥ N_aulas × 14 vars / 5s.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point")
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 300.0 }))

panels.title: Active aulas (last 5m)
panels.description: Número de assets distintos emitiendo en últimos 5 min.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r._value)
  |> group(columns: ["asset_id"])
  |> count()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0)
  |> group()
  |> count()

panels.title: Variables únicas (catálogo)
panels.description: Variables distintas activas. 21 esperadas según variables.yaml.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r._value)
  |> group(columns: ["variable"])
  |> count()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0)
  |> group()
  |> count()

panels.title: Ingest rate por bucket (points/min)
panels.description: Rate de inserción por bucket. Caída brusca → pipeline issue.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: count, createEmpty: true)
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "telemetry" }))

from(bucket: "state_events")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point_state")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: count, createEmpty: true)
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "state_events" }))

from(bucket: "telemetry_1m")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: count, createEmpty: true)
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "telemetry_1m_rollup" }))

panels.title: Errores publish (Telegraf, /sec)
panels.description: Tasa de errores por motivo (retention, format, timeout). >0.1/s = investigar.

panels.title: Health por servicio (Prometheus up{})
panels.description: Estado de cada componente del stack.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point")
  |> group(columns: ["asset_id", "variable"])
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> count()
